## Tags
tv, screen, display, virtual machine, vm, executable, settings, cog, edit, gear, configuration, preferences, system, control panel, network, computing

## Categories
connectivity, devices

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/monitor-cog)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::MonitorCog;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        MonitorCog { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
